prompt: Create a cinematic close-up of an ancient Turkic/Oghuz warrior’s ornate bronze-gold armor, focusing on the chest plate rather than the face. The breastplate features a large raised snarling wolf head emblem at the center, with pointed ears, sharp eyes, open mouth, visible teeth, and sculpted fur details. Surround the wolf with embossed swirling ornamental patterns, rivets, dark leather straps, and weathered metal plates. Show both shoulder pauldrons partially in frame, decorated with engraved motifs and layered armor segments. Use aged bronze and darkened steel with tarnish, scratches, patina, and realistic battle-worn texture. The warrior is mostly cropped from the neck down, with only a hint of long dark reddish hair above the collar. Set the scene in a blurred medieval battlefield or fortress environment at sunset, with warm golden rim light from the right and deep shadows on the left. Use shallow depth of field, dramatic cinematic lighting, anamorphic film look, ultra-realistic detail, 16:9 widescreen composition, no text, no logos, no modern elements.
